problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
mechanism: Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Resonant. Resonant inductive coupling for wireless power directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
